name: Missive Blog
description: The official Missive blog covering product updates, team collaboration, customer service, and productivity tips.
rssFetchNote: No RSS/Atom feed discovered at standard paths (/blog/feed.xml, /blog/feed/, /feed.xml, /rss.xml, /blog/index.xml, /blog/atom.xml). The blog is a custom-rendered site without a machine-readable feed; posts are surfaced via HTML scraping.
